overall.description: A third-person video game sequence showing a character in a futuristic suit exploring a dark industrial facility illuminated by red emergency lighting. The character navigates through narrow corridors and metal platforms before approaching and interacting with a massive circular vault door.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial maintenance corridor with overhead pipes

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through a narrow corridor illuminated by red emergency lights

entered.detail: large metal pipes running along the corridor walls
riveted metal wall panels with industrial texture
red glowing emergency lights casting warm illumination throughout the corridor
metal doorway with red light visible beyond

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. Large metal pipes line the walls as the character approaches a doorway at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal platform with safety railings

events.description: exits narrow corridor onto elevated metal platform with safety railings

agents.ego_description: moving onto a metal platform and looking around the industrial chamber

entered.detail: white metal guardrails along the platform edge
metal grate flooring of the elevated industrial platform
industrial control panels and machinery mounted on the wall
massive circular metal vault door with concentric rings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor onto an elevated metal platform with safety railings. The massive circular vault door becomes visible in the distance as the character explores the platform area.

events.description: approaches the large circular vault door and begins examining the mechanism
character reaches out to interact with the vault door control mechanism

agents.ego_description: examining the vault door mechanism and attempting to open the sealed door

entered.detail: central locking mechanism with circular pattern and hydraulic seals
black and yellow directional arrows painted on the door surface
small red indicator lights on the door frame

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive circular vault door, which dominates the frame as the camera moves closer. The character examines the central mechanism with its warning markings and red status lights, then reaches out to interact with the door controls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that opens up to reveal a massive, imposing vault door. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage lined with large metal pipes under the oppressive glow of red emergency lighting. As the character reaches the end of the hallway, the scene expands onto an elevated metal platform with safety railings, shifting the perspective to reveal the scale of the surrounding facility. The camera then pushes forward across the platform, allowing the circular vault door to dominate the frame as the character draws closer. Finally, the movement culminates in a close-up of the door's central mechanism, focusing on the warning markings and red status lights as the character reaches out to interact with the controls.
